programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Pansexual Sarah cant wait to road test her new body on her first date as a woman. Plumber Jamies love life has gone down the u-bend, so hes all cisterns go to find a partner.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Naked cleaner Elleigha meets perfectionist chef Louis and the chemistry is strong. Caitlin and Lucy try dating for the first time. And, can 40-year-old Asher be able to heal his past wounds?

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to the Isle of Wight to uncover four new items, and restorer Ronnie relives his past life on Ibiza via a three-wheeled trike.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil attempt to find homes for two sets of house hunters with very different needs in Derby and Nottingham. Single mum Jo Beck faces the emotional choices that many single parents have to deal with when looking to relocate with their kids. Kirstie meets adrenaline junkies Liz and John Fairfield, who want a home thats big enough to house all their outdoor sporting equipment.

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: To finally call their chapel home, Keith Brymer Jones and Marj Hogarth need a bedroom. Marj gilds a vintage mirror and Keith takes on storage solutions, before they enjoy a Welsh love spoon workshop.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the third night in and around Manchester, dental nurse Amy hosts an American-themed dinner party. But after one guest gets a mouthful of tin foil, will grandmas secret rub recipe smooth things over?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Brothers John and Andrew throw open the doors to their family farm in Dumfries and Galloway, at their glampsite Domes by the Sea. The domes seem to be an all-round success, and things get heated with a sauna experience and onsite hot tubs.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Our enterprising expats open for business in France and Spain, but power cuts strike Brian and Paulas restaurant and illness hits Jen and Nicks horse charity.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi helps Bernie and Vernon find a holiday home on the Canary Island of Fuerteventura, despite Vernon having never visited! Can they find the perfect place for their £150k?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Four years on from his first encounter with Nicola and Paul, Ben Hillman learns how theyve transformed their Lanzarote happy place into a sleek home. And Leah Charles-King takes a windswept walk on the Costa del Sol with Kim and Debbie.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Mansfield, a new week kicks off with a jaw-dropping evening of costume, music and homemade recipes from health-conscious granny Tina Ainsworth. Shes confident that her Chinese-themed evening will win over her guests, croupier Tomasz Wisniewski, PR consultant Julia Smith, copy writer Rachel Imms, and DJ Gareth Harding. Everything seems to go to plan, and things get flirty at the table.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Not to be outdone by the previous evenings entertainment, 27-year-old Polish croupier Tomasz Wisniewski hosts an `outrageous-themed evening, giving plenty of scope for his guests imaginations. Interpretations of the theme range from Bunny-Boy to giant toddler, and the night starts with a snoop around Tomasz bedroom. At dinner, the starter and main are well received.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Third to host in Mansfield is 32-year-old DJ Gareth Harding, who transforms his garden into a Balearic cocktail bar and club complete with lasers and disco lights. His theme is Ibiza, and the guests seem impressed with Gareths sophisticated menu, but has he bitten off more than he can chew by cooking a tricky beef Wellington? Discussion at dinner turns to Olympic sports.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On day four in Mansfield, Francophile Rachel Imms hosts a French evening. Will she rise to the challenge that her complicated main course presents? How will the guests react to eating the same dessert two days running? Before dinner is served, Rachel feeds some furry friends. The guests discuss whether French is the language of love, but entertainment in the form of a French accordionist doesnt appeal to everybody.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the final day of the competition in Mansfield, and dance fanatic Julia Smith is confident shell wow her guests with her fancy house and her hospitality. Having two waiters on hand certainly helps. The house really does impress, and while snooping around, Tomasz and Gareth discover some surprising secrets, and Tina and Rachel find an oil painting - which may or may not be of their host.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Joe and Kirsty want to swap their Hampshire house for a perfect forever home in the warmer climes of inland Valencia, Spain. Can Jean Johansson find them their dream place for their £280k?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.sub-title: South West and North East London, Revisited
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil catch up with househunting couples in London. Sarah and Ian and Louise and Matt were two couples looking to buy their first homes together, but both couples needed to compromise on where to buy. Sarah and Ian had to looked beyond their beloved Balham, while Louise and Matt had second thoughts about settling in north east London.

programme.title: The Race for Ancient Egypt in Colour
programme.desc: In 1922, Egypts fight for independence and the global mania surrounding the discovery of Tutankhamuns tomb put archaeology, nationalism and imperial politics at odds, in a race to control the ancient past.

programme.title: Roman Empire by Train with Alice Roberts
programme.desc: After crossing the Alps by train, Alice arrives in Nîmes. She wants to see the French citys classical Roman landmarks, considered better than any outside of Rome itself. The image of a crocodile is everywhere, representing the subjugation of Egypt.

programme.title: Bill Baileys Vietnam
programme.desc: Leaving the bustle of the city behind, Comedian Bill Bailey seeks solace in the beauty of mountainous Da Lat.

programme.title: Bill Baileys Remarkable Guide to the Orchestra
programme.desc: Comedian and classically trained musician, Bill Bailey joins forces with the brilliantly versatile BBC Concert Orchestra and musical maestro Anne Dudley.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: `The Capture, `Married at First Sight Australia and `Louis Theroux: Inside the Manosphere are just some of the shows on the Gogglebox. Theres also `The Floor, `Will and Ralf Should Know Better and `Britains Best Mattress: How to Sleep Better.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: Greg Davies: The Back of My Mums Head
programme.desc: Stung by his mothers suggestion that he is not normal, Greg puts everyone else under the microscope in a petty quest to discover if anyone actually is.

programme.title: Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing
programme.desc: The handcuffed couples face a new challenge: their first holiday away together. On neutral territory, and without friends and family around, how do they cope with just their cuff-partner for company? Naturally, tempers flare.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: Star-studded saga of the 1836 defence of the Alamo, when a 187-strong garrison including William Travis and Jim Bowie fought to save Texas from Santa Annas Mexican army for 13 days. programme.title: Police Interceptors

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britains Speeders
programme.desc: In Newcastle police crack down on drink and drug drivers, uninsured vehicles, and a serious motorbike crash. With lives at risk, officers must separate the truth from lies.

programme.title: Police: Night Shift 999

programme.title: The X-Files

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: Craig LeBeau and his crew set up camp on Gollen. Things start out well until bad weather and a stuck truck derail their operation.

programme.title: Outback Truckers

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: A 44-tonne articulated lorry has attempted to drive up a hill, hit sheet ice, slid back down out of control and jackknifed, leaving it wedged across both sides of the road.

Having shrugged off the rain, Julia ends with the epic 17-mile final day in the Lakes.

programme.title: The Birds
programme.desc: Wildlife film-maker Martin Dohrn contemplates the end of his career as he turns his lens to the dramatic dance between a million seabirds and a single hunting falcon. Uncovering new meaning in the mesmeric murmurations across the coast of Norfolk, he reveals important insights into the natural world while reflecting on a career behind the camera.

programme.title: Wild
programme.desc: Each year in the heart of southern Sweden, a special lake hosts a natural spectacle. Its a stop-off point for more than 10,000 cranes migrating northwards.

programme.title: Secrets of Size: Atoms to Supergalaxies
programme.desc: Jim will enter the Alice in Wonderland world of objects that are too tiny to glimpse with the naked eye. Starting with the smallest insects, he moves on to encounter living cells with amazing superpowers and confronts some of humanitys deadliest enemies in the form of viruses.

programme.title: Daniela Nardini Remembers... This Life
programme.desc: Daniela Nardini looks back on the 1990s BBC drama series This Life, which followed the misadventures of a group of flat-sharing friends pursuing careers in the law.

programme.title: This Life
programme.desc: Anna attends an interview at a well-to-do firm of solicitors to find herself confronted by old flame Miles. While Miles considers her application, his colleague Milly and her partner Egg wonder how to fill the house they have rented, and the fifth member of the group, Warren, is also interviewed for a job.

programme.title: This Life
programme.desc: Anna hopes to rekindle her romance with Miles - but he is less than keen. Milly makes good career progress, but Egg struggles to adjust to his job - and with living with Warren.

programme.title: Timeshift
programme.desc: Documentary which digs into the archive to discover the unwritten rules that have governed the way we drink in Britain. In the pubs and working mens clubs of the forties and fifties there were strict customs governing who stood where. To be invited to sup at the bar was a rite of passage for many young men. As the country prospered and foreign travel became widely available, so new drinking habits were introduced.

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson discovers how traditional boat building shaped the beautifully preserved village of Arnside on the banks of the River Kent in Lancashire.

programme.title: Wainwrights Walks: Coast to Coast
programme.desc: Julia Bradbury follows in the footsteps of guidebook writer Alfred Wainwright by walking across northern England from west to east coast. Over three mountain ranges and across three valleys, the second stage of Julias journey is a grand traverse of Wainwrights much-loved Lake District. Having shrugged off the rain, Julia ends with the epic 17-mile final day in the Lakes.

programme.title: The Birds
programme.desc: Wildlife film-maker Martin Dohrn contemplates the end of his career as he turns his lens to the dramatic dance between a million seabirds and a single hunting falcon. Uncovering new meaning in the mesmeric murmurations across the coast of Norfolk, he reveals important insights into the natural world while reflecting on a career behind the camera.

programme.title: Secrets of Size: Atoms to Supergalaxies
programme.desc: Jim will enter the Alice in Wonderland world of objects that are too tiny to glimpse with the naked eye. Starting with the smallest insects, he moves on to encounter living cells with amazing superpowers and confronts some of humanitys deadliest enemies in the form of viruses.

programme.desc: Join Gethin Jones, Helen Skelton, Michelle Ackerley and the team for conversation, advice and tips to make your day that little bit easier.

programme.title: Crimewatch Live
programme.desc: Heroin police catch a gang trafficking £7m worth of heroin across the UK. And detectives need help to solve a disturbing rape from 1987.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin is in Warwickshire to see a property above a former brewery with a quirky layout and a holey roof. Dion heads to Staffordshire to visit a three-bed mid-terrace with a huge back garden boasting elevated views over Stoke-on-Trent. And we return to Nottinghamshire to find out how the story ends for a couple who bought a former farm building at auction and planned to turn it into their forever home.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: The red and blue teams do battle in the historic village of Naseby, spearheaded by experts Kate Bliss and David Harper. For the blues, its husband and wife Shaun and Lea, and for the reds its father and daughter Dave and Leanne. With the clock ticking, the blues think theyve got their shop sewn up when they spot a vintage sewing machine. The reds find a collection of collectable pigs, but are they worth taking to market?

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Spanish Job
programme.desc: Alan persuades Amanda to let go of her maximalist instinct for this final bedroom. The pair settle on an all-white, exposed natural brick feel as they name the room a Balearic balm oasis.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: A London-based couple want to escape from the city to carve out a new life in either Somerset or Devon, where Briony May Williams has the keys to some wonderful countryside properties. Briony also meets up with some former Londoners who converted an old cowshed into an exceptional, self-sufficient, family home with spectacular views across the Axe Valley.

programme.title: The Repair Shop: On the Road
programme.desc: Dom teams up with carpenter Jen to save a beloved spider slide for a community centre in Dunblane. Can they make it safe for the next generation to enjoy?

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Roman Kemp, with sidekick Sarah Greene, hosts the quiz show where knowledge equals speed. Manisha, Malachy, Ciara, Marc and Chanel race in moving podiums across the studio to try to win £5,000.

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Join Gethin Jones, Helen Skelton, Michelle Ackerley and the team for conversation, advice and tips to make your day that little bit easier.

programme.title: Crimewatch Live
programme.desc: Heroin police catch a gang trafficking £7m worth of heroin across the UK. And detectives need help to solve a disturbing rape from 1987.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin is in Warwickshire to see a property above a former brewery with a quirky layout and a holey roof. Dion heads to Staffordshire to visit a three-bed mid-terrace with a huge back garden boasting elevated views over Stoke-on-Trent. And we return to Nottinghamshire to find out how the story ends for a couple who bought a former farm building at auction and planned to turn it into their forever home.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: The red and blue teams do battle in the historic village of Naseby, spearheaded by experts Kate Bliss and David Harper. For the blues, its husband and wife Shaun and Lea, and for the reds its father and daughter Dave and Leanne. With the clock ticking, the blues think theyve got their shop sewn up when they spot a vintage sewing machine. The reds find a collection of collectable pigs, but are they worth taking to market?

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Spanish Job
programme.desc: Alan persuades Amanda to let go of her maximalist instinct for this final bedroom. The pair settle on an all-white, exposed natural brick feel as they name the room a Balearic balm oasis.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: A London-based couple want to escape from the city to carve out a new life in either Somerset or Devon, where Briony May Williams has the keys to some wonderful countryside properties. Briony also meets up with some former Londoners who converted an old cowshed into an exceptional, self-sufficient, family home with spectacular views across the Axe Valley.

programme.title: The Repair Shop: On the Road
programme.desc: Dom teams up with carpenter Jen to save a beloved spider slide for a community centre in Dunblane. Can they make it safe for the next generation to enjoy?

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Roman Kemp, with sidekick Sarah Greene, hosts the quiz show where knowledge equals speed. Manisha, Malachy, Ciara, Marc and Chanel race in moving podiums across the studio to try to win £5,000.

programme.title: Clive Myries Italian Roadtrip
programme.desc: The village of Savoca has some of the best views in Sicily, which is why Martin Scorsese chose it to film The Godfathers wedding scene. Clive hangs out at the Bar Vitelli, made famous by the film, and chats to the cafe owner who played a bridesmaid.

programme.title: Serengeti
programme.desc: As the Serengeti starts to dry out, competition hots up between the families. The strong females take centre stage, dealing with wayward males and fighting for the survival of their kin. Plus, a new family has moved into the Serengeti: Kike a first-time cheetah mother with three tiny cubs in tow.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The 1936 cup tie between Blackpool and Bolton which was signed by players including Stanley Matthews, a rare salt-glazed mug made for a supporter of Bonnie Prince Charlie, and an unusual medal awarded for selling Hoovers in the 1930s.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: The crowds flock to a valuation day in Cirencester, where Paul Martin and our team of experts are on the look out for antiques and collectables to send to auction. Finds include a 17th-century wine bottle recovered from the bottom of a well and some costume jewellery by one of the worlds most famous fashion designers. Paul also visits Kelmscott House, the country home of William Morris, the father of the arts and crafts movement.

programme.title: Britains Biggest Warship
programme.sub-title: Out With the Old, In With the New
programme.desc: HMS Queen Elizabeth approaches the climax of her sea trials in the North Sea. The automatic flight deck fire fighting system is a major innovation on board but must now be tested for the first time. The new super carrier makes a special and poignant visit to Scapa Flow in the Orkneys to mark an astonishing naval centenary: it is 100 years to the day that an aircraft was successfully landed on a moving vessel, but with ultimately tragic consequences.

programme.desc: Live market reports from London. Overnight on Wall Street is early morning in Europe. Markets never sleep, and neither does Bloomberg News. Track investments 24 hours a day, around the clock from around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: As markets open across Europe, Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson, and Kriti Gupta present a breakdown of the biggest stories of the day, joined by guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua has conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, finance and politics. Going wherever the story is, bringing exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Insight on the top business stories and the state of the markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest

programme.title: Bloomberg Tech

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: When Professor Squawkenclucks mum comes to visit, a gigantic enraged rubbish monster is not far behind.

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: When the Fairy Squad get their wings gunked by Stinkweasel, the heroes must quest to end his reign of stinky nonsense over the forest.

programme.title: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programme.desc: Cheese and Dog tease each other for their respective lifestyles: Dog thinks Cheese is soft and pampered; while Cheese thinks Dog is an overeager exerciser and people pleaser. But when each tries out the others interests, they begin to enjoy it!

programme.title: Newsround
programme.desc: News magazine keeping young viewers up to date with the latest stories and events happening at home and abroad.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings catch a grasshopper that can give you whatever your heart desires.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton Paranoia: Plankton hasnt tried to steal the secret formula in a while...and thats making Mr. Krabs nervous!

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: The agents deal with a difficult case while Oscar interviews potential candidates to run the Odd Squad creature room.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher Unleashed!
programme.desc: Dennis doesnt realise the pressure hes putting on Rubi to excel in the school science fair is giving her a severe case of inventors block.

programme.title: Danny and Mick
programme.desc: Joy orders Danny and Mick to clean all the windows outside the leisure centre. At first it is a fun job, but soon they realise that they need to bring in some bigger machinery to reach the higher windows.

programme.title: Hey You What If?
programme.sub-title: You Could Shout Round the World
programme.desc: Find out how to shout from one side of the world to the other.

programme.title: Bitesize: 7-9 Year Olds
programme.desc: Learn about looking for vibrations, travelling vibrations, pitch and volume.

programme.title: One Zoo Three
programme.desc: The OZT brothers are on an adventure to take a closer look at some of Britains threatened grassland animals. Aaron and Cam go off-road in a bumpy dash across the wilds of Exmoor to try and gather more than 100 semi-wild ponies off the moor for their annual health check. Cam meets 12-year-old wildlife hero and butterfly champion Rebecca to find out why she is so fascinated with butterflies.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: Horrible Histories serves up the history of foul feasting, from Stone Age lentils to Queen Victorias anti-fart bread.

programme.title: Art Ninja
programme.desc: Ricky loves VR computer games and his favourite is Mind Kingdom! But things dont go to plan when Gav also becomes obsessed with it and wont give up the headset. Ricky gets inspired to make a Pin Ball Machine, something they can play together, some funky t-shirts and theres epic art with a virtually royal dot to dot.

programme.title: Horrible Science
programme.sub-title: A Meteor for the Dinosaurs, Binary Bangers and Perilous Plants
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix stars in Scientific First Dates, Marie Curie reacts to space, and the dinosaurs get an unwelcome musical meteor visitor.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: In the medieval Ethiopian city of Harar, Steve Backshall has a unique and potentially lethal encounter with a pack of spotted Hyenas. Out of the town and up into the Mountains Steve meets the rarest wolf on earth and discovers why a grass-munching monkey, the Gelada baboon, has a set of teeth that would make a vampire jealous.

programme.title: Operation Ouch!
programme.desc: The doctors put the acoustic reflex to the test with an enormous balloon, and a serious case of snotting awaits the loser of todays Ouchology.

programme.title: Andy And The Band
programme.desc: Odd Sock Henny Feathers is an egg-centric farmer whose chickens arent laying eggs. Armed with costumes, mini-cameras and a Chicken Translator, Andy and the Band investigate.

programme.title: A Kind of Spark
programme.desc: Franks history tour descends into chaos when Bonnie returns to Juniper determined to cause trouble. Keedie warns Addie to take care, but Addie feels a connection and wonders if she can help.

programme.title: Gifted
programme.desc: Jennas dad is back in her life but cant afford to stay. Jenna contemplates using her gift to win big money on a TV gameshow. Meanwhle, Jack and Ken search for a very special ghost.

programme.title: High Hoops
programme.desc: The chance of a trophy has Aoife focused on a win. However, Charlotte is distracted, and Aoife has to mute the cute if Charlotte is going to be back on her game.

programme.title: Malory Towers
programme.desc: Felicity and June follow a mysterious girl to Miss Graylings study: what does she want?

programme.title: Tish Tash

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing finds his old baby shoes. They are much too small for Bing now, but Coco loves them and so does baby Charlie. When they fit Charlie, Bing has a hard time letting them go to a new home until Charlies first steps help Bing to realise they will be more use to someone whose feet are the right size.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: All the Teletubbies are stuck. Tinky Winkys hand is stuck in his bag, Dipsys hat is stuck, Laa-Laas ball is stuck and Po is stuck on the Tubby Slidey.

programme.title: Tee and Mo
programme.desc: Its Mos birthday and Tee is determined to fill every minute of the day with fun and games. Mo tries to find a moment to sit down and catch her breath.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: Supertato and Evil Pea get stuck inside a giant bubble together. They float through the air until Supertato and Evil Pea pop the bubble by driving it into a supermarket sign.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Coco is showing Bing how magnets work. While Coco builds a tower, Bing wants to find more magnetic things. In the garden he tests the ball, table and key, announcing which are magnetic. When Bing tries the watering can, he accidentally drops the magnet behind the flowerbed! Neither Bing nor Coco can reach it, so Flop shows them how to fish with magnets.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: A mystery is afoot! Somebodys been digging up and running off with Jacksons giant vegetables. Detectives Mojo and Bo must follow the clues to the cagey culprit.

programme.title: Hey Duggees Squirrel Club
programme.desc: Introducing you to Squirrel Club are Happys Mum and Norries Dad. There is a lot to see, starting with Duggee walking along, but hes in two halves. Next is an instalment of the Squirrels favourite comic book, Detective Puppy.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels go on an adventure to find a famously shy creature called The Snard who doesnt like noise. Time to earn their Being Quiet badges!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a lick of each others ice cream. But they are so focused on making sure each lick is fair, they dont notice their ice creams are melting.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are finding out about an incredible fishy adventure called the salmon run. Every year, salmon swim from the oceans where they live all the way upstream to calm, shallow rivers to lay their eggs. On the way they have to leap up waterfalls, jump fish ladders and dash past hungry bears who try to catch them. Kyan thinks these fish are even better at fantastic gymnastics than he is! Ubercorn sets those co-ordinates for the Kenai River, Alaska.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Lost Journal
programme.desc: When Benjamin accidentally loses Peters dads journal, it falls into the clutches of Mr Tod.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: The Octonauts expand their exploration beyond the sea - and onto land. With new rides and new friends, they are prepared to protect any habitats and animals at risk on land or under the water.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.sub-title: All the Numbers I Can Be
programme.desc: One Hundred shows One all the different numbers she can split into.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: S is feeling a bit sad but T, A and P are here to help and before long, everyone is tap dancing. Oh dear! T has no tea, A has too many apples but S is sagging so the others want to help. P pops in and they try some word magic - perhaps a comforting pat or a big musical number? This episode introduces the letters S, A, T and P and the words sat, pat, tap and taps.

programme.title: Love Monster
programme.desc: Tiniest Fluffiest Bunny has a dance competition out of town. Love Monster misses her while she is gone and worries that he didnt wish her good luck.

programme.title: Playtime Towers
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit Patch in the Cloud Kitchen. He has found a tiny mouse in his pocket, which reminds him of a tasty treat recipe to make with the Playtimers - pocket mouse pitta!

programme.title: Roots and Fruits
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, its the bagpipe-playing Chilli Peppers, melting Kiwi backstage and performing their song Were Chilli When Its Hot!.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Its vaccination day! Bing knows it might hurt a little but he is looking forward to the special shiny Hoppity Voosh sticker he will get from Doctor Molly. Bing is brave, but when he goes to get his sticker after his vaccination, he finds out that there are none left! Bing is upset- but then Pando mistakes Bings disappointment for pain, and Doctor Bing has to help.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say `shark, and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of sharks. Theres a pointy nose shark and a big fin shark, a speedy shark and a grey and white shark. We meet a swishy-tailed shark and a sand shark.

programme.title: Lu and the Bally Bunch
programme.desc: Lu is a good friend to Barnaby when he regrets not showing the class his backwards roly poly.

programme.title: Piggy Builders
programme.desc: The Piggies are building a place for the Fine Forest community. Wilf is supposed to help but naps instead - so the building falls down! Rebuilding seems impossible, but what if everyone pitches in?

programme.title: Twirlywoos
programme.desc: The Twirlywoos watch a farmer connect fence panels together to make a pen for his sheep. The sheep dog herds the sheep into the pen. Whilst the farmer is having a doze, the Twirlywoos build an enclosure around him by connecting more fence panels together.

programme.title: Something Special: Were All Friends
programme.desc: Justin is in for a surprise when he meets two Irish dancing stars who set him a challenge. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble is trying to earn a star for his star chart by washing Lord Tumbles car.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies take selfies with the Tubby Phone and a child in Tummy Tales has their photo taken in a photo booth with their grandparent. Then its time for a Tubby Phone Dance.

programme.title: The Baby Club
programme.desc: Inside everyones bags are hairbrushes, which are explored through discovery, play, song and story. Grown-ups at home are encouraged to take part by hiding baby appropriate hairbrushes inside a fabric bag or pillowcase for them to reveal and explore with their baby! The fun song `This is the way we brush our hair features, as does a story involving Baby Bear.

programme.title: I Spy, You Spy
programme.desc: Elsee plays I Spy during a birthday party with her friends Ethan and Oscar.

programme.title: I Can Grow It
programme.desc: Aaron, Joda and Isla are on a new garden adventure, this time looking for plants called weeds, which grow in the most surprising of places.

programme.title: Monster Makes
programme.desc: Recycling day in the attic inspires several great makes. A pot becomes a hairdo, cheese boxes become octopuses, and buttons become a brilliant box robot.

programme.title: Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Wasabi eats a rare glownut, attracting all the glowing creatures who crown him king.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Bingo finds a walking leaf insect in the garden while playing a game with Bluey and dad, she gets upset when dad is too caught up in the game to notice.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee is a big, friendly dog who runs The Squirrel Club, an after-school activity club where children can learn and take part in all kinds of activities, have fun adventures, and earn badges for their achievements.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.sub-title: Top of the Pups: Wheels on the Bus
programme.desc: The Squirrels go on a bus ride with Duggee as they sing `Wheels on the Bus.

programme.title: Lets Go for a Walk
programme.sub-title: Ten-Mile Snake and Willow Tree Walk
programme.desc: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers walk to a great place to play a train game. On the way they find a ten-mile-long snake, make friends with a woodlouse, listen to the wind blowing through willow trees and even stomp like giants!

programme.title: Our Family
programme.desc: Eden and Ava love pretending and make-believe. In this episode, they enjoy a pretend picnic in their bedroom and invent amazing recipes like strawberry stew and vegetable cake! Theyre so yummy that Mum gets the hiccups. Later, Eden and Ava build a den for the whole family to hide in. They imagine theyre camping in the woods and look out at the stars. But will they be safe from the noisy tiger in the forest? Roar!

programme.title: My World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Hollys Merseyside Scouse and Crusty Bread
programme.desc: Holly comes from the English city, Liverpool. She will be making two tasty recipes. The first is a local Merseyside stew called scouse, made with chopped and cooked carrots, potatoes and onions with gravy, and her special ingredient: celery.

programme.title: Ferne and Rorys Teeny Tiny Creatures
programme.desc: Aness wants to find out about brilliant bats. Chantelle is in London to meet Sophie for a night-time adventure as bat detectives, while Rory and his son Sandy are at a country park looking for bat clues.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: Disability assistance dog Tinks needs all her super fetch skills and big dog energy as she helps Charli catch a bus to meet her friend Lydia, who is getting married.

programme.title: Go Wild

programme.desc: Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet the one-horned rhino and some babirusas.

programme.title: Waffle the Wonder Dog
programme.desc: On Waffles first day as a trial pupil, he struggles to hold a pen, so he tries to stop everyone else from writing too.

programme.title: Puffin Rock

programme.title: Small Potatoes

programme.title: Yukee

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggees uniform is a bit old and needs to be updated. Duggee can make his own clothes.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: Yakka Dee! celebrates children communicating - because talking fills you up with whizz, pop, bang! In this episode, Dee encourages a friend to say ball and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different balls and explore how they look and what they do. Theres a green ball, a blue ball and even a ball that goes moo! Theres a seat ball, some meatballs and a funny ball too. We see a ball to kick, a ball for disco dancing and a sparkly ball on a Christmas tree.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: One sunny day, Octoblock is searching for a missing flagpole on the beach, when suddenly the trail hes been following stops. But who would bring a flagpole to the beach? It is, of course, Octonaughty. He teases Octoblock and claims to be the king of the (sand)castle by raising the Octonaughty flag on the stolen flagpole. Its time for Octoblock to retrieve the flagpole from that naughty villain, but Octonaughty captures him.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: Ts tip-top trick is a tremendously tall tower of teacups - as long as he can avoid any assistance from accident-prone A.

programme.title: Something Special: Were All Friends
programme.desc: Justin visits the vet with his friends pet dog for a check-up. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble pretends to be a vet for his toy patients.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Patchwork Pals

programme.desc: Offering their unmatched satirical insight into current world events - including the latest news from the Winter Paralympics - Adam, Josh and Alex are joined by Richard Ayoade and Michelle Wolf to help dissect the biggest news stories of the week.

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes a sublime dukkah roast lamb feast with a fantastic hack to speed up cooking.

programme.title: Stacey Solomons Renovation Rescue
programme.desc: Stacey helps Jo and Darryl, whose seaside dream in Devon has turned into a nightmare. Can Stacey turn the tide and help them realise their dream of an upside-down living space?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.sub-title: South West and North East London, Revisited
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil catch up with househunting couples in London. Sarah and Ian and Louise and Matt were two couples looking to buy their first homes together, but both couples needed to compromise on where to buy. Sarah and Ian had to looked beyond their beloved Balham, while Louise and Matt had second thoughts about settling in north east London.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Nicki Chapman in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam tries to charm his beloved sports car away from the widow of the man who bought it.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier goes out on his first date since his marriage ended, and Cliff begins a business venture with his new video camera.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norms plan to avoid an IRS audit backfires and Sam tries to prevent the bar from watching an old Red Sox game.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie visits an optician and winds up with a pair of glasses just in time for the holidays. Unfortunately, she ends up putting the whole family on edge when she starts seeing them for better and for worse.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Raymond lies and tells Debra that hes already bought her an incredibly thoughtful Christmas present, he frantically tries to figure out what to get her.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank must make amends with his granddaughter, Ally, when she catches him stealing food at the supermarket.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Bulldog unexpectedly becomes a hero when he foils a robbery attempt, and Niles is nominated for a broadcasting award.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier is troubled by the realisation that his new relationship is based on physical attraction.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles loses his nerve to finally ask Daphne out on a date, and Frasier takes to watching a soap.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz meets her babys fathers folks, and is surprised to recognise a family trait.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon tries to revamp Voleos Seafood Restaurant, a second-generation family-run restaurant struggling to stay afloat following the devastation caused by Hurricane Ida in 2021.

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4s midday news summary.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole, Simon OBrien and Max McMurdo travel across the UK to find unique items lost in peoples homes to fix up for a profit. Simon and Max visit Surrey to meet an up-cycler.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: The Baker familys efforts begin to pay off, as the farm and its inhabitants are given a new lease of life. And Matt reveals his plans to increase biodiversity.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Nicki Chapman in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Trish and Ruth love Lanzarote so much that they want to buy a holiday home there, near the popular resort of Puerto del Carmen. Sara Damergi shows them what their £140k can buy.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In Italy, theres a tight turnaround for Angie and Ash. In Portugal, Harriet and Mondo branch out into events. And in Spain, Rachael and Lee bid to earn a crust at a pie shop.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Simon and Vanessa throw open the doors of their coastal Angove Guest House in Weymouth, where the decors delightful and the views are even more so. But for one guest, the highlight above all of that is some proper milk in the fridge.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the third night in Bedfordshire and Cambridgeshire and the turn of marketing executive Martina to cook. She hopes her menu of Thai curries and poached pears will impress her guests, one of whom doesnt like spice or fruit.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Danni Menzies returns to the beautiful coastal town of Denia on Spains Costa Blanca to check in on Alison, Brian and their dogs. Jasmine Harman heads back to the sun-kissed shores of Kapparis for a catch-up with Bill and Sandra.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Includes sport and weather.

programme.title: The Political Slot
programme.desc: Claire Coutinho MP, Shadow Secretary of State for Energy Security and Net Zero, sets out the Conservative Partys Cheap Power Plan.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil head to Nottingham, where Lexie and Ed are at a stalemate. Their four-bed, one-bathroom home is fit to burst, and Ed just wants to pack up and move to a bigger house. But Lexie thinks, with Kirsties help, that the house could work.

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Will Emma take Macs offer to leave Fairley - and Edwin - for good? Meanwhile, Adeles sobriety re-ignites her marriage with Adam, which causes rifts in the Fairley household.

programme.title: The Push: Murder on the Cliff
programme.desc: In 2021, lawyer Fawziyah Javed fell from the top of Arthurs Seat in Edinburgh. Her husband was soon arrested for murder. Scotlands top legal team need to skilfully paint a picture of what happened. Dark secrets emerge as the murder trial begins.

programme.title: The Push: Murder on the Cliff
programme.desc: Did Fawziyah Javed fall to her death or was she pushed? At her husbands murder trial, the jury are told about Fawziyahs dying declaration of what happened. Emotions run high in the court as the jury come back with a verdict.

programme.title: Berlin
programme.desc: (2023) Twisty-turny spy thriller with Aparshakti Khurana. A sign-language interpreter is caught between intelligence agencies during the interrogation of a suspected spy.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon travels to Eagle Rock California, to visit Capri - a restaurant in a rut - owned by overgrown identical twins, Jim and Jeff. The twins could have walked straight out of Alice in Wonderland and their method of running a restaurant is just as fantastic. Half comedy act half cry-babies, Jim and Jeff seem oblivious to the grime and dust riddling their restaurant.

Desai becomes a big-time player but his business methods leave much to be desired, and soon newspaper tycoon Gupta, an upright and principled man, is determined to destroy Desai.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where They All Turn Thirty
programme.desc: Celebrating Rachels 30th birthday inspires the friends to reminisce about their own 30th birthdays. Joey got angry with God for breaking their deal, Ross bought himself a sports car in an attempt to recapture his youth, and Monica got blind drunk and embarrassed herself at her surprise party.

programme.title: What Women Want
programme.desc: A chauvinistic advertising executive acquires the ability to hear what women are thinking. He attempts to use this power to bring about the fall of his female boss, but as he uses this inside knowledge to outwit his superior, the bachelor begins to fall in love with her, and so finds himself feeling more than a little guilty when his plan to have her sacked looks like it may come to fruition.

programme.desc: Dermot Murnaghan explores British murder stories filled with detective intrigue and chilling storylines of homicide and hate. The five murder stories are told with archived footage and key interviews from those closest to the case.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Airing from 2005 to 2009 on NBC, the game show series returns to primetime TV with original host Howie Mandel. A contestant must choose from 26 sealed briefcases containing a marker for various amounts of cash -- from one penny to $1 million. The player then eliminates the remaining 25 cases one by one. The chosen ones are opened and the amount of money inside revealed. After several cases are opened, the player is tempted by the Banker to accept an offer of cash in exchange for not continuing the game and possibly winning a larger sum of money.

A contestant must choose from 26 sealed briefcases containing a marker for various amounts of cash -- from one penny to $1 million. The player then eliminates the remaining 25 cases one by one. The chosen ones are opened and the amount of money inside revealed. After several cases are opened, the player is tempted by the Banker to accept an offer of cash in exchange for not continuing the game and possibly winning a larger sum of money.

programme.title: Hoffman Family Gold
programme.desc: As pay dirt from the Lost Cut Mine runs low, Hunter runs dirt from a promising new location called the Plateau.

programme.title: Hoffman Family Gold
programme.desc: The motor in Todds Black Pearl trommel catches fire. The Hoffman crew attempts to modify the smaller wash plant Jack built decades ago to run more pay dirt, but after Todd orders round-the-clock mining to hit their goal, failures begin to mount.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A novice builder attempts to construct a cabin in Vermonts White River Valley. The harsh winter and his lack of experience make this a challenging build.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Two brothers are building a high-end, off-grid vacation home in the middle of their 2,000-acre cattle ranch. They only have four months to complete it.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: The boys are back in Alaska (although Discovery dropped the states mention in the title after the first season) hoping to strike it rich mining for gold. Their first effort was anything but rich and glorious, however, as the crew led by Todd Hoffman and his father, Jack, sunk $250,000 into their dream and came away with just $20,000 worth of gold. The dismal summer was filled with injuries, malfunctioning equipment and constant fighting among the greenhorn miners, yet their serious case of gold fever trumps any talk of giving up and leads to a new operating plan in order to salvage their dream. The series also keeps tabs on the efforts of teenager Parker Schnabel and old-timer Dakota Fred to hit the mother lode at separate sites.

programme.desc: According to a legend that dates back to the 16th century, a cache of Incan gold worth hundreds of millions of dollars is hidden off the coast of southeastern Brazil. Its known as the `Treasure of the Trinity, and its eluded all who have sought it for 500 years. But a modern-day team of explorers follows a radical new theory to uncover its whereabouts: a remote, treacherous island where thousands of deadly vipers roam. Cork Graham leads the expedition to Queimada Grande - known to locals as Snake Island - armed with advanced technology to unearth complex clues and decipher puzzles that have protected the treasure for centuries. This Discovery series takes viewers along on the epic journey to one of the most dangerous places on Earth.

programme.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
programme.desc: According to a legend that dates back to the 16th century, a cache of Incan gold worth hundreds of millions of dollars is hidden off the coast of southeastern Brazil. Its known as the `Treasure of the Trinity, and its eluded all who have sought it for 500 years. But a modern-day team of explorers follows a radical new theory to uncover its whereabouts: a remote, treacherous island where thousands of deadly vipers roam. Cork Graham leads the expedition to Queimada Grande - known to locals as Snake Island - armed with advanced technology to unearth complex clues and decipher puzzles that have protected the treasure for centuries. This Discovery series takes viewers along on the epic journey to one of the most dangerous places on Earth.

programme.desc: Bruce `Two Dogs Bozsum of Mohegan Sun, a Native American gaming and entertainment empire owned and operated by the Mohegan tribe of Connecticut, goes undercover posing as a contestant on a reality TV competition.

programme.desc: Gordon visits a lodge in Idaho that was built by the owners own hands before the entrepreneur lost his passion due to a family tragedy.

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon heads to Southbridge, Massachusetts, and checks into the Vienna Inn, an Austrian-themed hotel and restaurant. Owners Jonathan and Lisa have seen their cluttered inn acquire a reputation among the locals, and business isnt what it used to be.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Joe and Lana are looking to live in the suburbs with their three young kids. To realise this dream, Drew and Jonathan must first conduct a major makeover on their current home.

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: Captain Glenn is shocked to see what the crew did to the boat during their night off; he doesnt let the crew off the hook for the damage they caused.

programme.title: Taskmaster: Champion of Champions
programme.desc: Five comics create a mask that looks and tastes great, and clear up a mess of their own making, in the showdown to end all showdowns. But who will claim the crown?

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts a brand new show, as Sean Lock and Joe Wilkinson take on Jon Richardson and Harriet Kemsley. Plus James Veitch is in Dictionary Corner.

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark and Jeremy go on the pull and find themselves smoking pot in the Lazerbowl toilets with a teenage goth. Jeremy perseveres with the sexy Toni despite her refusal to stop talking about Peter Gabriel, and after a few pints Mark decides a melon is a big improvement on a bowling ball.

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark makes a friend at a business conference - but will it turn into more than just friendship? Meanwhile, Jeremy is forced to consider Super Hans as a replacement flatmate - and resolves to stop at nothing to keep Mark and himself together.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Alice gets her claws into dog-lover Williams cover after he betrayed his furry friends in ink. Sketch slaps a new tattoo on Jules, whos branded with the palm-print of her ex.

programme.title: Taskmaster: Champion of Champions
programme.desc: Five comics create a mask that looks and tastes great, and clear up a mess of their own making, in the showdown to end all showdowns. But who will claim the crown?

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Inga and Jazzs ever-tightening friendship doesnt go unnoticed. Beks and Philip continue to grow close, but Beks isnt sure the spark is there. And will an unexpected bombshell spell disaster for Livvy and Kits rekindled romance?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa inadvertently makes hillbilly singing sensations out of Cletus kids, but soon regrets it. Thatll teach her to break into spontaneous song.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Adam appear on a mother-and-son cookery show on public access TV. Barry ruins his college letter of recommendation.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is thrilled when he is asked to design his own video game for a school project. Beverly frets that Pops is too keen on gambling.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: In 2011, Anna turned wedding planner for her girly fiancee Sian. Theyre back to relive the climactic events that nearly led Anna to cancel their big day.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Lucas has a tough decision to make in order to protect himself from a dangerous cellmate. Elsewhere, Warren is determined to uncover the truth from someone, no matter the cost.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: While Tony and Diane head to London for answers, Doms left holding the fort - but the teens have other plans. Ste returns to devastating news. And Warren is determined to get to the truth.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tubes naughty little sister Rude-ish Tube, featuring sheep.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The opening episode of a new series sees Gordon in Plainfield, New Jersey, trying to save a floundering soul food restaurant called Blackberrys. He comes up against the indomitable Shelley, an owner who runs her establishment with an iron fist, and doesnt want to hear what Gordon has to say. Gordon must find a way to convince her to change her ways if the restaurant is going to stand a chance.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: This Is This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: The Dropouts are booked to perform a gig at a charity carnival. Beverlys concerns about Murrays health push him to the limit.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica decides to apply to appear on television quiz Jeopardy! A new crush makes Barry realise that he might not be quite over Lainey yet.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell and Cam settle into their new normal and Phil and Claire decide that one of the kids needs to move out. As Gloria becomes more successful at work, she notices Jay and the kids dont seem to need her as much.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire are annoyed at the chaos at home and decide that one of the kids have to move out. Cam gets a call that offers him his dream job and Jay has a special surprise for Gloria.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: After weeks of honeymoons filled with romance, laughter and the occasional clash, the couples return from paradise to face their first major test: the first dinner party.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Beauty queen bricklayer Chloe seeks a girl with grand designs for the future. India wants a tall, dark, handsome guy. And financial investigator Sylthea gives her date a grilling.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across the United States, travelling to New Jersey to try to snatch Italian restaurant Leones from the jaws of failure. Owner Leone had a thriving business, but after a sudden illness she spent two years in hospital in a coma. When she returned, she was heartbroken to discover that her lazy son Michael had run all her efforts and the restaurant into the ground.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Springfield takes a battering when the army comes to town and Homer finds himself on the wrong side of a fearsome Colonel.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Believing Moe to have the tormented soul of an artist, Lisa helps him discover his inner poet, but when success goes to his head and he abandons her, Homer vows revenge.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Calamity and comedy go hand-in-hand when the Dunphys throw Luke a birthday bash. The party is certainly memorable, especially when Cam shows up as Fizbo the clown.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: This seasonal special reminds us that Christmas is about giggling as well as giving. Claire and Phil go all Grinch-y, and Lily is taken to see Santa.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: After weeks of honeymoons filled with romance, laughter and the occasional clash, the couples return from paradise to face their first major test: the first dinner party.

programme.title: Celebrity Coach Trip
programme.desc: The coach pulls into Lisbon, where a pair of loved-up newbies join the trip. The group head to the beach for a morning of paddleboarding, but a spot of sabotage rocks the boat. The competition is raised further in a knockout game of bubble football.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grandpa Simpson is moved out of the Springfield Retirement Castle and into the Simpson family home in a bid to save Homer cash. The move brings Grandpa closer to Selma and love blossoms between the unlikely pair. Meanwhile, Lisa and Bart cause mischief with a bunch of complimentary shipping boxes.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After experiencing the rush of selling a scandalous picture of Duffman cheating on his fiancee with Booberella to a sleazy tabloid, Homer decides to become a paparazzo.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: A revelation leaves Warren seething, and tensions flare at The Loft. Meanwhile, when a text lands in the wrong hands, a resident is forced into a tough parenting dilemma.

programme.desc: Our newly-weds are moving in together, and fast-tracked into a brand-new, intense phase of the experiment: Revelations Week. The couples take on some new tasks designed to help them be raw, open and honest with each other.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claires new positivity gets her in trouble when it comes to Lukes relationship. Its Phil who gets the shock when he surprises Alex at school.

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay has grown children, grandchildren and a gorgeous young wife, who has a preteen son of her own; all together they must try to bridge generational, cultural and social gaps.

programme.title: The Debt Collector
programme.desc: Nicky Dryden is a reformed ex-con whos put his life as a murderous debt collector behind him and becomes a best-selling writer and acclaimed sculptor thanks to his new wife. When an embittered detective who put him away 18 years ago refuses to believe hes reformed, he starts a vengeful campaign to try and get to Dryden return to his old ways.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: The Bedford Incident
programme.desc: Thriller about a photojournalist on board a destroyer, the Bedford, commanded by Captain Finlander. When the ship discovers a Soviet sub in Greenlands territorial waters, the Captain begins a relentless pursuit that pushes his crew to breaking point.

programme.title: Captain Phillips Interview
programme.desc: Tom Hanks and director Paul Greengrass talk about taking to the sea to make the fact-based dramatic-thriller `Captain Phillips.

programme.title: Heaven Knows, Mr Allison
programme.desc: A Roman Catholic nun and a hard-bitten US Marine are stranded together on a Japanese-occupied island in the South Pacific during World War II. Under constant threat of discovery by a ruthless enemy, they hide in a cave and forage for food together. Their forced companionship and the struggle for survival forge a powerful emotional bond between them.

programme.title: The True Story of Jesse James
programme.desc: Borrowing widely from Nunally Johnsons script for Henry Kings 1939 version of the legend (and using two sequences from the same production), Nicholas Rays version portrays Jesse James as a rebel rather than a simple outlaw, driven to a life of crime by Northern sympathisers after the Civil War as the film follows the last 18 years of his life.

programme.title: The Enemy Below
programme.desc: During World War II, the commander of an American destroyer matches wits with a German U-boat captain in the Atlantic.

programme.title: Made in Italy
programme.desc: A bohemian artist travels from London to Italy with his estranged son to sell the house they inherited from his late wife.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: In a barrage of fists, gunfire and squealing tires, an enraged man must save his wife and son from a dangerous adversary -- and ensure that he will never be underestimated again.

programme.title: Beast
programme.desc: In a small island community, a troubled young woman falls for a mysterious outsider, who empowers her to escape her oppressive family. When he comes under suspicion for a series of murders, she defends him at all costs.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune and Fantasy
programme.desc: Three women deal with the problems of modern relationships in different situations. A young womans friend falls in love with her ex, while a bitter student asks his lover to trap his professor. Lastly, two old friends meet again after 20 years.

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James returns home to his native Yorkshire, where he is joined by good friend and multi award-winning chef Brian Turner. James visits top chef Frances Atkins beautiful restaurant the Yorke Arms, where he enjoys her signature dish al fresco, in her unusual dining room the Onion. Brian tastes the delights of some Yorkshire charcuterie, and later they both take time out, where James brushes up his clay pigeon skills and Brian is challenged to some off-road driving.

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James visits the stunning Lake District, where he is joined by top Michelin-starred chef Clare Smyth. James visits Clares meat suppliers the Lake District Farmers, while Clare learns the secret of the Lake Districts famous sticky toffee pudding. They both visit the Windermere Jetty Museum, and are treated to a trip out on Lake Windermere on a traditional steam-powered boat.
